violations.text: The upstairs food service area is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The handle of the faucet at the three bay sink was in poor repair (turning but not dispensing water). New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quateranry ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
